projects.name: Task Manager Website

projects.name: Personal Portfolio

impact_highlights.description: Built interactive UI components at Webflow Corp internship using vanilla JavaScript, HTML, and CSS, contributing to production frontend codebase.
Implemented client-side data persistence in Task Manager project using localStorage, enabling tasks to survive page refreshes without backend infrastructure.
